name: Beetroot extract
summary: Decision-ready summary: Beetroot extract is best framed for blood pressure support; endurance performance; nitric oxide support; safety screen: hypotension; nitrate medications; kidney-stone susceptibility.
description: Beetroot extract supports blood flow; endurance; blood pressure with moderate-high confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: Use caution with hypotension or nitrate/PDE-5 medication contexts.
contraindications: Caution with hypotension or blood pressure medication use due to additive blood-pressure-lowering effects that can cause dizziness or fainting
caution combining with PDE5 inhibitors such as sildenafil or tadalafil due to overlapping nitric-oxide pathways and risk of pronounced blood pressure drops
caution with nitrate medications due to the same nitric-oxide mechanism
high-nitrate intake caution for individuals with methemoglobinemia risk or on nitrate-restricted diets.
